insight.headline: Customer API Update
insight.what_changed: The Customer Account API version 2026-10 removes the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the associated Checkout type subtree. This change affects apps using the Customer Account API to manage customer checkouts. The removal of this field is part of Shopify's efforts to simplify and streamline its APIs.
insight.developer_impact: Developers should review their code to ensure they are not relying on the removed field or subtree. They should update their apps to use alternative fields or APIs to manage customer checkouts. For example, they can use the Checkout API to retrieve checkout information. Additionally, developers should test their apps to ensure they are compatible with the updated API version. This change may require updates to existing code, so developers should plan accordingly to avoid disruptions to their apps.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may notice changes in how customer checkouts are managed, but the overall impact should be minimal. Merchants should ensure their apps are updated to the latest version to take advantage of the simplified API.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it simplifies the Customer Account API and reduces the complexity of managing customer checkouts. It also ensures that developers are using the most up-to-date and efficient APIs to build their apps.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with improvements to app updates and bug fixes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify honest and transparent review practices.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field has been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing for sub-region markets in the Admin GraphQL API 2026-07.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed hooks for selecting variants.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0 with minor changes to make the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0 with patch changes to add deploy flags and environment variables.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API as of the 2026-07 API version.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: The GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API now includes a lineItem field, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates focus on market-driven shipping, GraphQL Admin API, and Hydrogen improvements

themes.title: Market-driven shipping
themes.detail: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to configure shipping directly on a market. The GraphQL Admin API supports market-driven shipping configuration as of API version 2026-07. Merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping.

themes.title: GraphQL Admin API updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has several updates, including the removal of the deprecated Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field, the addition of draft order deposit fields, and the introduction of a new lineItem field on the GiftCard object. The API also now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill.

themes.title: Hydrogen and deployment updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen now deploys to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen and @shopify/cli-hydrogen packages have been updated. The Oxygen Vite plugin is now self-sufficient, and deploy flags and environment variables have been added for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

actions.text: Update apps to use market-driven shipping configuration
Migrate to GraphQL Admin API version 2026-07
